notes: NOT shipped as a recipe (would write wrong dates). country=Morocco; source_url=https://diplomatie.ma/en/royal-speeches; source_name=diplomatie.ma (Royal Speeches); region=Africa; iso3n=504; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext; leaders_covered=King Mohammed VI | Same royal speeches as mar_maroc (which IS green). diplomatie.ma is static Drupal behind an F5/BIG-IP ASM UA-keyed WAF ('Request Rejected / support ID' to the bot UA; a browser user_agent returns the full 500KB page) + a broken TLS chain (verify_ssl:false) - both solvable. BLOCKERS: (1) the /en listing is stale & sparse (~6 items, newest ~2021, ?page pager dead past page 0); (2) the /ar listing paginates fine (12 cards/page, .card items with title link + body .field--name-body) BUT its dates use Maghrebi Arabic month names (نونبر=Nov, يوليوز=Jul, غشت=Aug) that dateparser cannot parse - they silently fall back to today's date - and the AR detail pages carry no date element. FIX: either add a Maghrebi->standard month map to the engine's date parsing (then scrape /ar as static + browser UA + verify_ssl:false, item_selector .card, item_date from card, text .field--name-body, title from card link since detail h1 is generic 'Royal News'), OR just rely on mar_maroc (English official translation, 60 items 2012-2025). RECOMMENDATION: use mar_maroc for Morocco.
